title: dryopria oppositifolia
intro: Dryopria oppositifolia, also known as False Dittany, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopria oppositifolia include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Dryopria oppositifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically to the affected area to harness its medicinal properties.
